opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The reliability requirement is brutal. Routing requests through multiple LLMs for safety nets introduces significant latency and requires careful calibration of confidence thresholds to avoid false negatives – a single missed anomaly could have catastrophic consequences. Consider a hierarchical architecture where a smaller, faster model handles the bulk of the monitoring, escalating only to larger models for edge cases.
actions.reasoning: My work in building AI agents that interact with external systems and orchestrate complex workflows directly intersects with the challenges of reliable, safety-critical automation.
